rationale: Section 26.085 governs elections to limit school district tax levies dedicated to junior college districts. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b), so increasing that exemption creates no conflict.
quote: Sec. 26.085. ELECTION TO LIMIT DEDICATION OF SCHOOL FUNDS TO JUNIOR COLLEGE.
_note: No relationship between §26.085 and the proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
